name: Vampire Genesis
name_jp: ヴァンパイアジェネシス
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Vampire Lord" you control. Once per turn: You can discard 1 Zombie monster to the GY, then target 1 Zombie monster in your GY with a Level less than the discarded Zombie monster's; Special Summon that target.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Vampire Lord" you control. Once per turn: You can discard 1 Zombie monster to the GY, then target 1 Zombie monster in your GY with a Level less than the discarded Zombie monster's; Special Summon that target.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 "Vampire Lord" you control. Once per turn: You can discard 1 Zombie monster to the GY, then target 1 Zombie monster in your GY with a Level less than the discarded Zombie monster's; Special Summon that target.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack
Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
